message:
type: CLAIM
files: src/click/core.py,src/click/types.py
summary: Implementing dynamic default resolution for Options (dict-based default mapping) in core.py Option/Command classes

type: CLAIM
files: src/click/core.py,src/click/types.py
summary: Adding batch_size parameter to multiple options for chunked processing

type: STATUS
files: src/click/core.py
summary: Done: added batch_size kwarg to Option.__init__ (after flag_value/multiple, before count), validation in the existing if __debug__ block (near the count checks), batch_size in Option.to_info_dict, new type_cast_value() override on Option, and a new _batched() helper near the existing batch() function at top of core.py. Did not touch default-resolution logic (default_is_missing/self.default assignment) so should be low-collision with your dict-default work.

type: INTENT
files: src/click/core.py:Option.__init__ (debug validation block),Option.consume_value (new override),Option.process_value (new override),Option.get_help_extra,Command.main,Command._resolve_dynamic_defaults (new);src/click/types.py:convert_type
summary: Adding dict-based dynamic default resolution: new Option overrides for consume_value/process_value, help text (dynamic) for dict defaults, and Command._resolve_dynamic_defaults second pass called from Command.main after make_context. Only touching Option.__init__'s debug block to add dynamic-default key/value validation - should be additive, not overlapping your batch_size code.

type: STATUS
files: src/click/core.py,src/click/types.py
summary: Done: dict-based dynamic defaults implemented and passing full test suite (739 passed). Touched Option.__init__ debug block (added dynamic-default validation only, did not remove/change your batch_size checks - append if merging), merged dict-default skip logic into the EXISTING Option.consume_value (had two consume_value defs would have clashed) and existing Option.process_value area, added Command._resolve_dynamic_defaults + call in Command.main, get_help_extra dynamic-dict branch, and types.convert_type dict-guard. Ready to submit patch.txt.
